glosses.vi: một cách tự nhiên; dĩ nhiên

sentences.target: Je réponds naturellement à ses messages.

translations.fr: Je réponds naturellement à ses messages.
translations.en: I reply to their messages naturally.
translations.es: Respondo a sus mensajes de forma natural.
translations.de: Ich antworte ganz natürlich auf ihre Nachrichten.
translations.it: Rispondo ai suoi messaggi in modo naturale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我自然地回复对方的消息。
translations.ru: Я отвечаю на его сообщения естественно.
translations.pt: Eu respondo naturalmente às mensagens dele.
translations.he: אני עונה להודעות שלו באופן טבעי.
translations.vi: Tôi trả lời tin nhắn của họ một cách tự nhiên.
translations.nl: Ik reageer op zijn berichten heel natuurlijk.
translations.uk: Я відповідаю на його повідомлення природно.
translations.hi: मैं उनके संदेशों का स्वाभाविक रूप से जवाब देता हूँ.
translations.pl: Odpowiadam na jego wiadomości w naturalny sposób.
translations.el: Απαντάω στα μηνύματά του με φυσικό τρόπο.
translations.nb: Jeg svarer på meldingene hans på en naturlig måte.
translations.sv: Jag svarar på hans meddelanden på ett naturligt sätt.
translations.ro: Răspund în mod natural la mesajele lui.
translations.da: Jeg svarer på hans beskeder på en naturlig måde.
translations.ja: 私は相手のメッセージに自然に返信します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; syntactic subject of the verb.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; intransitive with a prepositional complement (répondre à + NP).
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb phrase to indicate the manner or obviousness of the action.
Preposition introducing an indirect object/complement (répondre à).
Third-person possessive determiner agreeing with a plural noun; marks possession of 'messages' by a 3rd-person referent.
Common noun, plural; complement of the preposition 'à' (object of 'répondre à').

sentences.target: Ça vient naturellement avec la pratique.

translations.fr: Ça vient naturellement avec la pratique.
translations.es: Eso viene de forma natural con la práctica.
translations.de: Mit Übung kommt es ganz natürlich.
translations.zh-Hans: 通过练习会自然而然地掌握。
translations.pt: Isso vem naturalmente com a prática.
translations.he: זה מגיע באופן טבעי עם תרגול.
translations.vi: Nó sẽ đến một cách tự nhiên với việc luyện tập.
translations.ar: هذا يأتي بشكل طبيعي مع الممارسة.
translations.hi: अभ्यास के साथ यह स्वाभाविक रूप से आता है.
translations.el: Αυτό έρχεται φυσικά με την εξάσκηση.
translations.id: Itu datang secara alami dengan latihan.
translations.ja: 練習すれば自然に身につきます。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the subject; refers to a previously mentioned situation or fact.
Intransitive lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicates the subject.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb to indicate the way the event occurs.
Preposition introducing a comitative/instrumental complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for the noun 'pratique'.
Common noun, feminine singular; complement of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Je veux naturellement éviter les conflits.

translations.fr: Je veux naturellement éviter les conflits.
translations.en: I naturally want to avoid conflicts.
translations.es: Por naturaleza, quiero evitar los conflictos.
translations.de: Ich möchte Konflikte von Natur aus vermeiden.
translations.it: Per natura voglio evitare i conflitti.
translations.ru: Я по природе хочу избегать конфликтов.
translations.pt: Por natureza, eu quero evitar conflitos.
translations.vi: Theo bản năng, tôi muốn tránh xung đột.
translations.nl: Van nature wil ik conflicten vermijden.
translations.uk: Від природи я хочу уникати конфліктів.
translations.hu: Természetemnél fogva kerülni akarom a konfliktusokat.
translations.hi: मैं स्वभाव से टकराव से बचना चाहता हूँ.
translations.el: Από τη φύση μου θέλω να αποφεύγω τις συγκρούσεις.
translations.nb: Av natur vil jeg unngå konflikter.
translations.id: Secara alami saya ingin menghindari konflik.
translations.sv: Av natur vill jag undvika konflikter.
translations.ro: Din fire vreau să evit conflictele.
translations.cs: Od přírody se chci vyhýbat konfliktům.
translations.da: Af natur vil jeg undgå konflikter.
translations.ja: もともと争いを避けたいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'veux'.
Modal lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an infinitival complement.
Adverb modifying the predicate; here scopes over the desiderative/infinitival action.
Infinitive verb as complement of 'veux'; transitive, taking a direct object.
Definite article, plural; determiner for 'conflits'.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the infinitive 'éviter'.

translations.es: Elegimos este café de forma natural.
translations.de: Wir entscheiden uns ganz natürlich für dieses Café.
translations.it: Scegliamo questo bar in modo naturale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们自然而然地选这家咖啡馆。
translations.yue: 我哋自然會揀呢間咖啡店。
translations.he: אנחנו בוחרים את בית הקפה הזה באופן טבעי.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi tự nhiên chọn quán cà phê này.
translations.nl: We kiezen vanzelf voor dit café.
translations.hu: Magától értetődően ezt a कावेज़ót választjuk.
translations.hi: हम स्वाभाविक रूप से इस कैफ़े को चुनते हैं.
translations.nb: Vi velger denne kafeen helt naturlig.
translations.id: Kami secara alami memilih kafe ini.
translations.sv: Vi väljer det här kaféet helt naturligt.
translations.ro: Alegem în mod natural această cafenea.
translations.da: Vi vælger denne café helt naturligt.
translations.ja: 私たちは自然にこのカフェを選びます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun used colloquially for 'we'; subject of the verb.
Transitive lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct object.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb to indicate obvious or customary choice.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; points to a specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'choisit'.
